10Ze9PEvRh.fact: Platform files must cover all targets — every function in a platform_*.go must have implementations for darwin, linux, freebsd, windows. Missing one = compile failure on that OS. Treat as a checklist.

WXkBSXvF8g.fact: Use //go:build (modern syntax, Go 1.17+), not // +build. One constraint per file, first line before package declaration.
